details.test: Task 1 - Create sprint breeding pair with specific race results
Task 2 - Add feed and supplement to cart under $90 subtotal
Task 3 - Register 4 even-numbered young birds for Spring Classic 150km
Task 4 - Create progressive training plan for Old Birds A
Task 5 - Purchase Loft Pro 1-year membership with LOFT10 coupon
Task 6 - Compare sprint pigeons by return rate and tag best as Breeding Candidate 2026
Task 7 - Save 3 winter breeding articles and add to Winter Prep reading list
Task 8 - Create fixed-price marketplace listing for 3 young birds
Task 9 - Book 60-minute loft management consultation on upcoming Wednesday 7 PM
